description: An applicant who was denied housing calls, claiming discrimination. The manager must handle the call according to policy.

nodes.task_description: Listen to the complaint without admitting fault and express empathy.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent maintains a professional and calm demeanor while acknowledging the caller's frustration.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the applicant's file and the documented, non-discriminatory reason for their denial (e.g., poor credit score).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls up the application file and confirms the denial was based on standard rental criteria.

nodes.task_description: Escalate the call to the brokerage's legal counsel or senior manager and document the incident.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent does not attempt to resolve the legal complaint themselves but escalates it to the proper channel and creates a detailed incident report.
